skills.description_cn: 锁定技，若你的装备区里没有防具牌，你视为装备着【八卦阵】。
skills.description_en: Locked: If you have no Armor in your Equipment Zone, you are treated as having [Eight Trigrams] equipped.

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色手牌当【火攻】使用。
skills.description_en: You may use any red hand card as [Incendiary].

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色手牌当【无懈可击】使用。
skills.description_en: You may use any black hand card as [Nullification].

skills.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以选择一名其他角色，本回合结束时和其下回合结束时，其将手牌调整至与你手牌数相同（至多摸至五张）。
skills.description_en: End Phase: Choose another character. At the end of their next turn, they adjust their hand count to equal yours (drawing up to 5 if fewer, or discarding down to match).

skills.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】或伤害锦囊牌时，你可以选择其中一个手牌数不小于你的目标角色，将其一张牌置于你的武将牌上，称为“荣”。
skills.description_en: When you use [Kill] or a damage-dealing Tool card, you may choose one target whose hand count is not less than yours and place 1 of their cards on your character card as a Glory token.

skills.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若“荣”的数量不小于3，你用任意手牌替换等量的“荣”，减少1点体力上限并获得“清侧”。
skills.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if you have 3 or more Glory tokens, reduce your Max HP by 1, then gain Clear the Flanks.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以移去一张“荣”，然后弃置场上的一张牌。
skills.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may remove 1 Glory token, then discard 1 card on the field.

skills.description_cn: 你出牌阶段使用的首张牌无距离限制。当你于出牌阶段使用基本牌或普通锦囊牌时，你可以令此牌不能被响应，然后你本阶段不能再使用牌。
skills.description_en: The first card you use each Action Phase ignores distance restrictions. When you use a Basic card or Non Time-Delay Tool card during your Action Phase, you may declare it cannot be responded to; if you do, you cannot use any more cards this Action Phase.

skills.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以观看牌堆顶三张牌，然后获得其中X张牌，将剩余牌以任意顺序置于牌堆顶（X为你满足的项数：1.本回合造成过伤害；2.本回合未弃置过牌；3.手牌数全场最少）。若均不满足，你与一名其他角色各失去1点体力。
skills.description_en: End Phase: You may look at the top 3 cards of the deck, then take X of them (X = number of met conditions: 1. you dealt damage this turn; 2. you discarded no cards this turn; 3. you have the fewest hand cards on the field); place the rest on top in any order. If no conditions are met, you and another character each lose 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你每回合首次成为其他角色【杀】或【决斗】的目标后，若其手牌数不小于你，此牌对你无效。
skills.description_en: Locked: The first time each turn another character's [Kill] or [Duel] targets you, if they have at least as many hand cards as you, that card is Nullified against you.

skills.description_cn: 当每回合首次有牌移出/移入游戏后，你可以与一名其他角色各摸/弃置一张牌，然后你可以令其中一名手牌数为X的角色回复1点体力（X为“箜声”牌数）。
skills.description_en: The first time each turn a card is Removed from the Game or enters the game: you and another character each draw 1 card (if a card entered) or each discard 1 card (if a card was removed). Then you may choose 1 character whose hand count equals X to recover 1 HP (X = number of Konghou cards).

skills.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以将任意张牌置于你的武将牌上。结束阶段，你获得“箜声”牌中的非装备牌，然后令一名角色使用剩余“箜声”牌并失去1点体力。
skills.description_en: Starting Phase: You may place any number of hand cards on your character card as Konghou cards. End Phase: Take back all non-equipment Konghou cards; then instruct a character to use each remaining Konghou card, and that character loses 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，摸牌阶段，你改为摸X张牌（X为存活势力数）；出牌阶段结束时，若你此阶段：1.没有造成伤害，将手牌摸至当前体力值；2.造成伤害数超过1点，本回合手牌上限改为已损失体力值。
skills.description_en: Locked: During your Draw Phase, draw X cards instead of 2 (X = number of surviving factions). At the end of your Action Phase: 1. If you dealt no damage this phase, draw up to your current HP Value; 2. If you dealt more than 1 damage this phase, your Hand Limit this turn becomes your HP Lost.

skills.description_cn: 主公技，你于弃牌阶段弃置的牌可以交给任意名其他群雄角色各一张。
skills.description_en: Lord Skill: During your Discard Phase, you may distribute the cards you would discard among any number of other Qun faction characters (1 card per character).

skills.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以指定一名其他角色并废除你的判定区和装备区，然后你本回合对其使用牌无距离和次数限制，其本回合不能使用和打出手牌。
skills.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, choose another character and abolish your Judgment Zone and Equipment Zone. This turn, cards you use targeting them have no distance or count restrictions, and they cannot Use or Play any hand cards this turn.

skills.description_cn: 当你成为锦囊牌的目标时，若此牌的目标数大于1，你可以交给其中一名目标角色一张牌，然后摸一张牌，若你给出的牌是装备牌，改为摸两张牌。
skills.description_en: When a multi-target Tool card targets you, you may give 1 hand card to one of the other targets, then draw 1 card. If the card you gave was an Equipment card, draw 2 cards instead.

skills.description_cn: 当你于回合内使用基本牌或锦囊牌指定目标后，你可以弃置不是此牌目标的一名角色一张牌，然后该角色摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: When you use a Basic card or Tool card and designate targets during your turn, you may discard 1 card from a character who is not a target, then that character draws 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以摸两张牌，然后将手牌弃置至X张（X为你于此回合内发动过“奇制”的次数）。
skills.description_en: End Phase: You may draw 2 cards, then discard hand cards down to X (X = number of times Adaptive Tactics was activated this turn).

skills.description_cn: 当你成为其他角色使用牌的目标后，你可令手牌数最少的一名角色摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: After you become the target of a card used by another character, you may have the character with the fewest hand cards draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 转换技，阳：出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张牌交给一名手牌数最多的角色，然后对其造成1点伤害。若该角色因此死亡，则你可以令一名角色将手牌摸至四张。 阴：其他角色对你造成伤害后，你可以观看该角色的手牌，然后交给其一张牌，当前回合结束时，若该角色未失去此牌，你将手牌摸至四张。
skills.description_en: Convert Skill: Yang — Once per Action Phase: Give 1 hand card to the character with the most hand cards, then deal 1 damage to them. If they die from this, you may have 1 character draw up to 4 hand cards. Yin — After another character deals damage to you: look at that character's hand cards, then give them 1 card. At the end of the current turn, if they still hold that card, draw until you have 4 hand cards.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌，然后选择一项：令一名手牌数大于你的角色交给你一张牌；或令一名装备区里牌数大于你的角色弃置一张装备牌。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card, then choose one: have a character with more hand cards than you give you 1 hand card; or have a character with more equipped cards than you discard 1 of their equipment cards.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你发动“飞军”时，若目标与你之前指定的目标均不相同，则你摸两张牌。
skills.description_en: Locked: Each time you activate Flying Corps, if the target has not been targeted by Flying Corps before this turn, draw 2 cards.

skills.description_cn: 转换技，阳：当你成为其他角色使用【杀】的目标后，你可以与其各摸一张牌，然后其本回合不能再对你使用牌。 阴：当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以获得其中一名目标的一张牌，然后你本回合不能再对其使用牌。
skills.description_en: Convert Skill: Yang — When another character's [Kill] targets you: you and that character each draw 1 card, then they cannot use cards targeting you for the rest of this turn. Yin — When you use [Kill] and designate a target: take 1 card from one of the targets, then you cannot use cards targeting them for the rest of this turn.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你获得3个“橘”标记。（有“橘”的角色受到伤害时，你防止此伤害，然后移去一个“橘”；有“橘”的角色于摸牌阶段额外摸一张牌。）
skills.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, gain 3 Tangerine tokens. When a character holding a Tangerine takes damage, prevent that damage and remove 1 Tangerine from them. Characters holding Tangerines draw 1 extra card during their Draw Phase.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以失去1点体力或移去一个“橘”，然后令一名其他角色获得一个“橘”。
skills.description_en: Action Phase start: You may lose 1 health or remove 1 Tangerine, then give another character 1 Tangerine.

skills.description_cn: 若你没有“橘”，你可以跳过摸牌阶段然后获得一个“橘”。
skills.description_en: If you have no Tangerines, you may skip your Draw Phase and gain 1 Tangerine.

skills.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束后，你可以选择一项：令至多X名角色各摸一张牌；对任意名体力值之和为X的角色各造成1点伤害，若目标不少于2名，你失去1点体力（X为你此阶段弃置的牌数）。
skills.description_en: After your Discard Phase ends, choose one: have up to X characters each draw 1 card; or deal 1 damage to any number of characters whose combined HP Values equal X (if targeting 2 or more characters, you also lose 1 HP). (X = number of cards discarded this phase.)

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你的出牌阶段内，攻击范围内不包含你的角色不能成为你使用牌的目标。出牌阶段结束时，若你本阶段内使用的牌数小于这些角色数，你弃置其中一名角色一张牌。
skills.description_en: Locked: During your Action Phase, characters outside your Attack Range cannot be targeted by your cards. At the end of your Action Phase, if the number of cards you used this phase is less than the number of such out-of-range characters, discard 1 card from one of them.

skills.description_cn: 主公技，其他吴势力角色于其出牌阶段使用【杀】结算结束后，其可以将此【杀】交给你，然后你可以令其摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: Lord Skill: After another Wu faction character's [Kill] resolves during their Action Phase, they may give that [Kill] to you; if they do, you may have them draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 当你于回合外失去牌后，你可以判定，当非红桃判定牌生效后，你将此牌置于你的武将牌上，称为“田”。你计算与其他角色的距离-X（X为你“田”的数量）。
skills.description_en: When you lose cards outside your turn, you may make a judgment. If the judgment card is not Hearts, place it on your character card as a Field card. Your distance to other characters is reduced by X (X = number of Field cards).

skills.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若“田”的数量不小于3，你减少1点体力上限，然后获得“急袭”。
skills.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if you have 3 or more Field cards, reduce your Max HP by 1, then gain Swift Raid.

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张“田”当【顺手牵羊】使用。
skills.description_en: You may use a Field card as [Steal].

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你不能被横置，且不能成为延时类锦囊牌或其他角色拼点的目标。
skills.description_en: Locked: You cannot be placed into the Chain State, and cannot be targeted by Time-Delayed Tool cards or Point Duels initiated by other characters.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以废除你装备区里的一种装备栏，然后执行对应的一项：武器栏：本回合你可以多使用三张【杀】；防具栏：本回合手牌上限+3；坐骑栏：本回合你使用牌无距离限制；宝物栏：本回合获得"集智"。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Abolish one Equipment slot in your Equipment Zone, then apply the corresponding effect. Weapon slot: use up to 3 additional [Kill] this turn. Armor slot: Hand Limit +3 this turn. Mount slot: your cards ignore distance restrictions this turn. Treasure slot: gain Gathered Wisdom this turn.

skills.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你所有装备栏均被废除或体力值为1，则你减少1点体力上限，将手牌补至体力上限，失去“决堰”并获得“怀柔”。
skills.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if all your Equipment slots are abolished or your HP Value is 1, reduce your Max HP by 1, draw until your hand count equals your Max HP, lose Breach the Dam, and gain Pacify.

skills.description_cn: 当你使用非转化锦囊牌时，你可以摸一张牌，若此牌是基本牌，你可以弃置此牌令你本回合手牌上限+1。
skills.description_en: When you use a Non Time-Delay Tool card that was not treated as another card, you may draw 1 card. If that drawn card is a Basic card, you may discard it to increase your Hand Limit by 1 this turn.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以重铸装备牌。
skills.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may Reforge equipment cards.

skills.description_cn: 转换技，出牌阶段限一次，阳：你可以摸一张牌，然后弃置两张手牌。 阴：你可以摸两张牌，然后弃置一张手牌。 若如此做，直到本回合结束，你使用与弃置牌相同花色的牌无距离和次数限制。
skills.description_en: Convert Skill — Once per Action Phase: Yang: Draw 1 card, then discard 2 hand cards. Yin: Draw 2 cards, then discard 1 hand card. After doing so, until the end of this turn, cards you use that share a suit with any discarded card have no distance or count restrictions.

skills.description_cn: 当你使用一张牌结算结束后，若此牌与你本回合使用的牌类型均不同（包括装备牌），你可以将此牌置于牌堆顶，然后摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: After a card you use resolves, if its type differs from every card type you have used this turn (including Equipment cards), you may place it on top of the deck and draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你摸牌时，改为从牌堆底摸牌。
skills.description_en: Locked Skill: When you draw cards, draw from the bottom of the deck instead.

skills.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你摸一张牌，然后将你的一张手牌置于你的武将牌上，称为“任”。结束阶段，你可以用手牌替换“任”。
skills.description_en: At the start of the game, draw 1 card, then place 1 hand card on your character card as Duty. End Phase: You may replace Duty with a hand card.

skills.description_cn: 转换技，阳：出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名攻击范围内的其他角色并弃置x张与“任”颜色相同的牌对其造成1点伤害（x为你与其体力值之差且至少为1） 阴：你的回合外，当你使用或打出的牌结算结束后，若此牌与“任”类别相同，则你可令一名角色摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: Convert Skill: Yang — Once per Action Phase: Choose a character within your Attack Range. Discard X cards matching the color of Duty to deal 1 damage to them (X = absolute difference between your HP Values, minimum 1). Yin — Outside your turn, after a card you Use or Play resolves: if it shares a category with Duty, you may have 1 character draw 1 card.
